zh.Pershore, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾培斯爾
zh.Worcester, Worcestershire, England, Unit: 英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Fraunceys於大約1288年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親William de Franceis II43歲，母親Agnes De Tyckenhall41歲。他於1314年與Mrs John Frauncweys在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特結婚。他去世於1317年在他的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.Pershore, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾培斯爾
zh-hans.Worcester, Worcestershire, England, Unit: 英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Fraunceys于大约1288年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲William de Franceis II43岁，母亲Agnes De Tyckenhall41岁。他于1314年与Mrs John Frauncweys在英国武斯特斯爾伍斯特结婚。他去世于1317年在他的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Fraunceys was born about 1288, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, William de Franceis II, was 43 and his mother, Agnes De Tyckenhall, was 41. He married Mrs John Frauncweys in 1314, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England. He died in 1317, in his hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Fraunceys est né environ 1288, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Franceis II, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Tyckenhall, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Mrs John Frauncweys en 1314, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1317, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Fraunceys um 1288 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Franceis II 43 und seine Mutter Agnes De Tyckenhall 41. Er hat 1314 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England Mrs John Frauncweys geheiratet. Er starb 1317 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Fraunceys è nato il circa 1288 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William de Franceis II, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Agnes De Tyckenhall, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Mrs John Frauncweys nel 1314, nel Worcester, Worcestershire, England. Morì nel 1317, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Fraunceysが約1288年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父William de Franceis IIは43歳，母Agnes De Tyckenhallは41歳であった。1314年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターでMrs John Frauncweysと結婚した。彼は1317年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Fraunceys(이)가 대략 1288년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Franceis II(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes De Tyckenhall(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1314년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 Mrs John Frauncweys(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1317년 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Fraunceys nasceu aproximadamente 1288, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Franceis II, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De Tyckenhall, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs John Frauncweys em 1314, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1317, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Fraunceys родился около 1288 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Franceis II было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Tyckenhall, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs John Frauncweys в 1314 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия. Он умер в 1317 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Fraunceys nació aproximadamente 1288, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Franceis II, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Agnes De Tyckenhall, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Mrs John Frauncweys en 1314, en Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1317, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
